case_title: CRONANDER JONATHAN VS THE SYSTEM PARKING

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT THE SYSTEM PARKING HEARING SET FOR APR-10-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-10-1991, GRANTED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRONANDER JONATHAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE SYSTEM PARKING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
